title: Yosys gives wrong output - changing "assign a = b" to direct wire (in instantiation) works

features.name: crossed_port_connections_in_module_instantiation
features.description: Code should include crossed module port connections where output signal A connects to input B and output signal B connects to input A in an instantiation

features.name: positional_port_connection_ordering
features.description: Code should include module instantiation with positional port connections where signals are passed in crossed order
features.snippet: swap main (r_i, a_i, d_i, r1_i, a1_i, d1_i, ctl_a, ctl_b, actl_i, r_o, a_o, d_o, rst);

features.name: wire_to_input_port_connection
features.description: Code should include connecting a wire directly to an input port of an instantiated module
